title: dichaea alcantarae
intro: Dichaea alcantarae, also known as the orchid Dichaea, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to Central and South America, where it grows in humid forests. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Dichaea alcantarae, including infusions and decoctions, are used to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections.
